neverHotLoad: all entries under apps[] — they are single-file deliverables, not plugins
exclusionPolicy.rationale: Hot-loading invalidates the proof property of audited code. The configHash recorded at decision time must match what's actually running. Client builds also require explicit user consent for the update cadence. Apps deploy as static HTML — updates ship via git push not runtime injection.

app.name: string · unique kebab-case · matches repo name
app.prime: number · mesh-channel prime · unique per app
app.size: number · single-file HTML size in bytes
app.tier: A | B | C · risk/audit tier · C = Simon-owned, no client gate
app.hotLoadable: boolean · always false for apps · they're deliverables
app.messageTarget: string · postMessage target for cross-tool API
